name: Gan & Mo

skills.name: Forever Entwined
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal extra damage.Flying Sword hits apply Sword Energy to targets, and Flying Swords dealextra damage to targets marked with Sword Energy.

skills.name: Guard Her Grave
skills.description: Launches Splitting Sword and moves backwards, knocking back the enemyand dealing damage while reducing their Magical Defense.

skills.name: Coupled Blades - Short
skills.description: Launches a Flying Sword, dealing damage to enemies in its path.

skills.name: Coupled Blades - Long
skills.description: Launches a Flying Sword, dealing damage to enemies in its path.

tips: Gan & Mo is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Frozen Breath → Boots of Tranquility → Scepter of Reverberation → Mask of Agony → Savant's Wrath → Void Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Gan & Mo's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Guard Her Grave → Coupled Blades - Short → Coupled Blades - Long → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Gan & Mo excels into Pei, Jing. Avoid blind picking into Sun Ce, Li Xin, Kaizer without team peel.
Gan & Mo sits at Tier B globally (50.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Gan & Mo good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Gan & Mo is Tier B Mage with 50.4% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Gan & Mo build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Frozen Breath, Boots of Tranquility, Scepter of Reverberation, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Gan & Mo?
faqs.answer: Pick Sun Ce, Li Xin, Kaizer into Gan & Mo. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Gan & Mo completes core items. Gan & Mo struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Gan & Mo counter?
faqs.answer: Gan & Mo is strong into Pei, Jing according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Gan & Mo when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Gan & Mo good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Gan & Mo sits at Tier B globally (50.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Gan & Mo play?
faqs.answer: Gan & Mo is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Gan & Mo?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Gan & Mo or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Gan & Mo vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Gan & Mo when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Gan & Mo?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
